_comment: Optional MCP server configuration for the prompt-auditor skill. Merge into your VS Code user-level MCP config (~Library/Application Support/Code/User/mcp.json on macOS) or project-level .vscode/mcp.json to enable dynamic initialization (Check #5 delta layer). The skill will fall back to built-in knowledge if these servers are unavailable.

docs-openai.description: OpenAI developer documentation search. Used for GPT-5 audits.

context7.description: General library/framework docs. Used for Claude and Mistral audits.

docs-langchain.description: LangChain documentation search. Optional — used when auditing LangChain-based agent prompts.
